floor_history.headline: Recon: vT40 floor=4 reproduces on main (canonical C, 178/179); the handoff's active lever (rich-pass permuter workspace + triage + all session-10 tooling) was LOST with the bb2-work-marion worktree an

Structural axis for the pair-swap measured CLOSED: 26 forms swept (geometry/decl-order/type/staging), floor stays 4; NEW mechanism fact — shift-merged-into-load geometry moves the sched2 tie WITHOUT t

Structural s3: decoupled-addu family measured DEAD (22 new forms); pair-swap seat-trade proven invariant to deref position, arg5val life, web decomposition, and plus-operand canonicalization - addu-ea

Permuter s4: campaign rebuilt on main (vT40 base, permuter 220 = masked 4); sampler found the FIRST honest 179-insn region-3 steal-kill (dst2 alias-merge, masked 17; +sanctioned saved split-init = mas

Permuter s5: harvested the two s4-carryover campaigns; alias-merge family further confirmed CLOSED (permuter 85 = masked 14, permuter 95-2 = masked 15 — deeper permuter progress trades MORE seats, wor

Forensics s6: pair-swap named as sched2 T-14 tie between insns 106/117 (both pri=2 ashlsi3) broken by insn-number ordering; region-3 named as reorg pass-1 fill_simple_delay_slots on check2-beqz steali

frontier.hypothesis: A young-label / post-flow-label spelling can force fill_simple to reject the check2 slot fill without paying a visible byte
frontier.mechanism: reorg's find_basic_block(-1) returns -1 for labels created AFTER flow analysis (post-cse2/loop), triggering all-live-at-label conservatism → move $5,$20 rejected as slot fill (session-10's BB2_ALLLIVE_LABEL knob proves this route byte-exactly)
frontier.next_probe: Enumerate GCC 2.7.2 passes that CREATE new CODE_LABELs after flow.c: dbr pass itself creates delay_seq labels but too late; loop.c splits labels but pre-flow; cse2 does not; combine does not; sched can move around but does not create. The only C-level lever left is a construct whose EXPAND-time CFG has a label that survives cse/loop/combine/flow simplification into dbr as a not-yet-analyzed label — e.g. a computed goto (unavailable in K&R), a switch-in-macro that expands to a fresh label after inlining (all our inlines are C90 fn calls), or a __builtin_expect-style hint (not in GCC 2.7.2). Conclusion: no reachable young-label mechanism in this compiler+C combination.

frontier.hypothesis: The 137 stack-arg-push insn's T-index CAN be nudged one slot earlier by re-ordering the debug_printf call site's ARG-EVALUATION order (e.g. moving the *pp load into a stack-arg via a helper struct or a comma-op) which would let 122 shift from T-12 to T-11 and 120 to T-13, freeing T-14 for 120
frontier.mechanism: In GCC 2.7.2, function-call arg evaluation order is C90-implementation-defined; changing which arg receives the arg5 value (currently 5th) via calling debug_printf with a different signature wrapper could re-anchor the stack-push in dep-DAG
frontier.next_probe: This is a NON-forensics modality (would require a permuter session sampling debug_printf arg-signature rewrites). Forbidden here: cross-symbol/semantic-lie C. The signature must stay debug_printf(fmt, pp, D_800A11DC[D_800A11D5], *(s32*)t0, arg5). Only true-semantics respellings of the LOADS producing 5th/6th/7th arg values are eligible — s3's y/w/x sweeps exhausted them (all reach masked 4-8 with either baseline coupled fixed point or seat trade). Frontier: negative.

frontier.hypothesis: The running s4/s5 permuter campaigns (perm PID 1935645 vT40-base, perm_c PID 1935593 find105-base) may still find a sub-4 form; the sampler's discovery of the vP160/output-160-3 masked-3 signposts proves it samples label-attracting shapes the hand-forensics ruled impossible-by-analysis
frontier.mechanism: Permuter can mutate PERM_GENERAL/PERM_RANDOMIZE_TYPE across the vT40 base without our analytical constraint that the label must be semantically-justified — but every semantically-DIVERGENT find (vP160 uninit-read class) is a REJECTED banked form
frontier.next_probe: Recheck the running campaign's output-dirs at s7/s8 handoff time (do not disturb this session — the campaigns are the ONLY active lever).

judge_constraints: FINAL owner ruling 2026-07-06 (do-while-zero-exception.md): do-while(0) sanctioned for ANY codegen effect incl. RA weighting, mandatory inline FAKE annotation; nested wraps additionally need a single-level-insufficient justification. The interim not-sanctioned ruling is superseded. STILL FORBIDDEN: regfix, register pins, __asm__ injection, semantic-lie C (cross-symbol derivation, per 2026-07-05).

candidate.c = vT40 (masked 4, verified): layer-1 review round-3 verdict was PASS-except-one — the NESTED wrap at line ~111 was held NEEDS_USER at the time; under the FINAL ruling it needs a documented single-level-insufficient justification (vT44 battery was staged to eliminate it entirely — check evidence). The Judge must independently verify that justification or its elimination.

Residual gap is 2 root-caused items (see evidence: pair-swap @56/57 coupled fixed point — sched2 LUID tie + qty_compare 5.33v5.33 tie; wrap toolbox measured DEAD for this pair). Do NOT re-derive the 140-ordering sweep, the 9-variant topology sweep, or the cc1psx parity test — all closed negative. Active lever at handoff: rich-pass permuter on the vT40 base.

STRATEGY (fable-blitz 2026-07-07): develop the exchange lever on the CHEAPER twin cpu_side_move_dir_4 FIRST (its ip/g3 residual is the exchange alone; masked ~6->0 on flip), then mirror here. The decisive allocation-equation material is in pre-merge commits aa8cad24 cd65f9c2 e5aa2dd4 f4bc8e67 df749bfd 622620cb (sessions 6f-6h: in-place basin correction, final qty_compare equation, s4 half-flip) — NOT fully represented in this ledger's s1-s3; read those commits before another permuter campaign.
